Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Continued To Nov-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Continued To Oct-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Epstein in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that no other Party was present. Mr. Epstein stated that two of the documents were signed on his behalf by someone else who assisted with filing of the documents. The Court will not allow Mr. Epstein to serve without representation of Counsel. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to October 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Epstein to obtain Counsel. The Court informed Mr. Epstein that he will also need to be fully bonded.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
